overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The player character walks along graffiti-covered sidewalks, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and passes through areas dense with holographic advertisements and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to graffiti wall with neon signage

events.description: approaching and entering the pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in plaid shirt crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art murals
large green neon arrow sign pointing right mounted on a metal pole
blue neon hotel sign visible in the distance among buildings
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered wall in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player walks forward past a large green neon arrow sign, approaching a crosswalk. A pedestrian in a plaid shirt crosses in front as the scene transitions toward the intersection.

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past the crosswalk from right to left
passing a burning trash barrel emitting flames on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving past the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: metal crowd control railings along the edge of the sidewalk
metal barrel with open flames burning inside on the sidewalk
bright yellow plastic construction barriers lining the street

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the open intersection, moving from the enclosed sidewalk into a wider street space. A black futuristic sedan drives past, and the player passes a burning trash barrel on the left. Yellow construction barriers line the right side of the street as the walk continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with heavy digital advertising

events.description: passing close by a large digital advertisement billboard featuring a woman in purple

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing by construction barriers and large holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large blue digital billboard with 'GIRLS ON FIRE' text in red and white letters
tall palm tree trunk visible on the left side of the street
tall illuminated advertisement showing a woman in purple jacket with 'MAXIM' branding

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy commercial street lined with yellow construction barriers on the right. The player passes massive digital billboards including one for 'GIRLS ON FIRE' and a large Maxim advertisement. Palm trees and various pedestrians populate the sidewalk as futuristic cars occasionally pass on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with scaffolding and industrial pipes

events.description: entering a narrower covered walkway surrounded by scaffolding and industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage with scaffolding overhead and industrial pipes along the walls

entered.detail: metal scaffolding framework surrounding the walkway on both sides
large white industrial pipes running horizontally along the left wall
overhead covered walkway with metal grating floor and enclosed sides
small shop entrance with warm orange neon lighting and advertisement posters

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, semi-enclosed walkway surrounded by metal scaffolding and large industrial pipes. The ground changes to metal grating, and the space feels more confined. A small neon-lit storefront glows warmly ahead as the player continues through this industrial passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban sidewalk through a bustling commercial intersection and into a confined industrial passage. It begins beside a graffiti-covered wall, moving past a glowing green neon arrow toward a crosswalk where a pedestrian passes by. As the camera enters the open intersection, the space expands to reveal a black futuristic sedan and a burning trash barrel before the path aligns with a row of yellow construction barriers. The scene then opens further into a vibrant commercial district filled with palm trees and massive digital billboards for Maxim and Girls on Fire, with futuristic traffic flowing nearby. Finally, the environment shifts from the wide street into a narrow, semi-enclosed walkway of metal scaffolding and industrial pipes, where the ground turns to grating and a small, warm neon storefront glows in the distance.
